title: Kuwait mandates three-tranche benchmark bond, sets price guidance
summary: The senior unsecured notes will list on the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Kuwait dinars money banknote bills with European euro banknotes background, selective focus of pile of Kuwaiti dinars and European euros banknotes currency exchange rates. Image used for illustrative purpose. Image courtesy: Getty Images/ Tamer Soliman

The senior unsecured notes will list on the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market

Staff Writer ,  ZAWYA

Kuwait has launched a benchmark three-tranche US dollar bond offering with three-, five- and 10-year tenors.
